name: io.github.Xquik-dev/xquik
description: Real-time X (Twitter) data platform. MCP v2 server with 2-tool sandbox (explore + xquik) covering 41+ REST API endpoints: monitors, events, webhooks, giveaway draws, 20 extraction tools, search, trends, radar, media download, tweet composer, style analysis, drafts, and user lookups. Legacy v1 server with 18 discrete tools also available.
